src: A black triangular leather bag with a textured surface and smooth handle. It has a small, gold emblem near the base on one side.
edit: A two-colored extraterrestrial bag with vibrant green and purple hues, metallic finish, and swirling patterns. It has futuristic, glowing emblems along the edges.

per_image_non_shared_src.ivan-kazlouskij-YCEw-2J6G6E-unsplash: The object leans against a circular mirror on a wooden shelf, accompanied by two white bottles with black tops in a minimalist room.
per_image_non_shared_src.ivan-kazlouskij-b7R2wAlbYDU-unsplash: The object stands on a wooden cabinet next to a circular mirror and a white lamp in a room with beige walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.ivan-kazlouskij-rbbUG5fR9pM-unsplash: The object is upright on a wooden shelf next to a framed sketch and a white lamp against white wooden panels.

per_image_non_shared_edit.ivan-kazlouskij-YCEw-2J6G6E-unsplash: The object leans against a circular mirror on a sleek, metallic shelf, accompanied by two silver bottles with glowing tops in a spaceship setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.ivan-kazlouskij-b7R2wAlbYDU-unsplash: The object stands on a metallic surface next to a circular viewing port and a neon-lit panel in a futuristic spaceship interior.
per_image_non_shared_edit.ivan-kazlouskij-rbbUG5fR9pM-unsplash: The object is upright on a shiny, metallic shelf next to a digital screen and a futuristic lamp against metallic ship walls.
